name: Sourdough Pizza Bread
recipeInstructions:
A very unique bread, guaranteed to garner many compliments:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bread machine.
2. For Sanyo/Seiko machines, use the following proportions:
- 6 tablespoons milk (plus 2 teaspoons)
- Two-thirds cup sourdough starter
- 2 tablespoons sugar (plus 1 teaspoon)
- 1 egg yolk, beaten
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons melted butter (plus 1 teaspoon)
- 1/4 teaspoon dried basil, crumbled
- 1/4 teaspoon dried oregano, crumbled
- 2 tablespoons grated Parmesan cheese
- 2 tablespoons finely minced pepperoni
- 3 cups flour
- 1 1/2 teaspoons yeast
